name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 12 Sep 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.69"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The control panel toolbar (at the top of the page) has been redesigned to include your website business name."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the extra options text wasn't wrapping over multiple lines on the checkout page."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the webstore checkout page so that clicking on the submit payment button multiple times doesn't create multiple charges or orders."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the Australia Post public rates that calculated item dimensions incorrectly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
